title: Why corporate AI super PACs spent $27 million on a local election
slides: Why did AI super PACs pour $27 million into one local race?
The election decided control of a key state's utility commission.
That commission will approve massive new data center electricity contracts.
Your company's AI costs are directly tied to those power approvals.
Track your local utility board meetings starting this month.
thread_text:
1. Who funded that?

$27 million from AI super PACs just flooded one local utility commission race.

2. The real prize

That race decides who approves electricity contracts for massive data centers.

3. Your AI cost link

Those contracts set the power rates your company pays to run models.

4. The hidden lever

Local utility board meetings—not Congress—control your future AI expenses.

5. Track this month

Find your next utility board meeting and put it on your calendar today.

Your AI costs depend on those contracts.
Track your local utility board now.
